content: Riset pola: sales_returns, roll reduction, PODetailPanel, cash linkage
Depth 1A: PO state machine (recompute_po_status partial/completed) + close-short endpoint
Depth 1A FE: PODetailPanel progress per item + status + Tutup PO (kurang)
Depth 1B BE: Retur Beli (purchase_returns) router+service + kurangi roll + nota debit + seed
Depth 1B FE: PurchaseReturns.jsx + nav (Pembelian → Retur Beli)
Depth 1C BE: Pelunasan PO via Kas (/pay) + AP outstanding/aging (/payables/summary)
Depth 1C FE: PODetailPanel Bayar + PayablesView (Hutang Supplier) + nav
Gates (verify_contract, data_integrity, ENTITY_REGISTRY, seed) all green 107 PASS
Screenshot verify new pages + testing_agent_v3 end-to-end + fix issues
